name: ctx42-skills
description: Shared skill suite for Claude Code — Go tooling, SRD authoring, and general authoring skills for Claude Code and Grok.

plugins.name: golang
plugins.description: Go workflow: enforced write-time style (style), done-time quality review (review), and per-function test-coverage improvement (cover).

plugins.name: srd
plugins.description: Software Requirement Document lifecycle: author (create), review read-only (review), edit in place (edit), and build-readiness system check (system-check), all against one SRD standard.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Cross-cutting engineering-craft aids: Conventional Commit messages (cm), a relentless planning interview (grill-me), a plan author/tracker (plan-smith), a skill author/auditor (skill-smith), a README author (readme-smith), and skill self-learning (enhance-skills).
